app.script:
df <- get.input()
fit <- lm(voltage_V ~ 0 + current_A, data = df)
plot(df$current_A, df$voltage_V,
  pch = 19, col = "darkgreen", cex = 1.6,
  xlab = "current_A", ylab = "voltage_V",
  main = "Ohm's Law"
)
arrows(df$current_A, df$voltage_V - df$voltage_err_V,
  df$current_A, df$voltage_V + df$voltage_err_V,
  angle = 90, code = 3, length = 0.05
)
abline(a = 0, b = coef(fit)[1], col = "navy", lwd = 2)
cat(sprintf("Estimated resistance: %.2f ohm\n", coef(fit)[1]))
